calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Dismissal - No Appearance

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2004 Dismissal - No Appearance

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-24-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Raquel Fox, Esq. for Petitioner: Maria Macias, present as Guardian at litem for: Daniel Macias, a minor Claimant, and with Spanish Interpreter: Tomas Margain.
Petitioner and Interpreter, were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $10,000.00 is approved.
No fees or Costs.
The Court taken this matter under sumission to review of Deposit of the settlement funds.

Nov. 24, 2004
Order signed by Comm. Kaplan.
Plaintiff's attorney is to make an annual accounting of the settlement funds to the Court and to Plaintiff Macias. Plaintiff's attorney is to schedule a hearing in dept. 218 in Nov. 2005 and in each November thereafter. This Order remains in effect until Daniela Macias reaches age 18, or unless otherwise modified.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2004 Set For Trial On Jan-10-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-22-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 602
